name: GOODMANS COFFEE
sample_reviews: Fun and unique coffee shop in Miyako. Wonderful coffee and a cool vibe inside the Airstream. Definitely stop by during the day to grab a cup of coffee!
What a cozy little place. The owner is very passionate and kind. Great selection of coffee and baked goods. Atmosphere is a solid 10/10.
The food and drinks are incredible. The proprietor is very kind and welcoming. It's such a relaxing and fun coffee shop!
Super cool coffee place in Miyako! Owner is very friendly and passionate. We enjoyed both the pour over and espresso tonic.
Great coffee with plenty of choices. You know a place knows its coffee when you can order iced espresso or Aero coffee. Great for a quick stop if you're going by car as there is free parking nearby.

name: Ningin Coffee（ニンギン珈琲）
address: 日本〒906-0015 Okinawa, Miyakojima, Hirara, Kugai-670-4 1階
sample_reviews: If you stay in Miyakojima for two weeks, you will notice something surprising: truly good coffee is not easy to find on the island.

This is truly some of the best coffee I've ever had, not to mention how exceptional the experience was. We tried three types of pour over, an espresso, and an oat latte, and everything was incredible and made with so much care and intention. We came here every day while on Miyakojima (one day we went twice), and I can't wait to come back again!

Best cafe in Miyako! We visited 3 days in a row. Great coffee and the best basque cheese cake. Super friendly staff and atmosphere was great, love the vibe of the cafe. Relaxing and calming place for a quick reset break.
I came at 11am at a weekday morning, its almost full already. Ordered a butter toast and a drip coffee. Taste good and reasonable price point. A decent interior design as well. Staff are nice.

name: Cafe Nuis
sample_reviews: I had cafe au lait that I could choose with my currey, which is 3 parts coffee to 7 parts milk. No foaming. It was nice even thougu I usally only drink lattes.

This place is a little gem in Miyakojima. We stopped for a quick lunch and had tasty and flavourful sandwiches and good quality coffee and everything was delicious. The curry had local and tasty flavours and we loved the beni imo in it. The service was super friendly, we got some beach recommendation from the owner, and after forgetting my bag there, he was driving to the beach he recommended to give it back. We came back and waited for him to come back. The Miyako people and the Japanese people are the nicest and friendliest people I've met. You should definitely visit when coming to Miyako Island
店主好好、早餐好有heart好食、仲要對住這個靚景
Cozy and refreshing! An unexpectedly European place in the middle of the Japanese wilderness. There are delicious herbal teas and great coffee ^^ also they have WiFi here. とても美味しいです 🥰🤩 …
A nice, modern-style cafe with tasty toasted sandwiches, iced lattes, and cheesecake. Even without a terrace it's a nice, bright place to sit and has a pretty view of the farm outside.

name: chill Miyako
sample_reviews: Atmosphere is very nice with a bit of an industrial/surfer vibe. Ordered the acai bowl which was well balanced. The cold noodles were the perfect blend of Korean cold noodles and Okinawa soba. The pork on rice side dish with an egg was flavorful without being overstated and a good deal at 650 yen.
餐點好吃，我們一家人吃的很開心。
Amazing miyako soba and açaí bowl. One of a few places open in the morning.
I tried an acai bowl for the first time in my life, and I never thought it would be this delicious!!!
店員很nice 又很漂亮🥰 餐點好吃～

name: Sunayama Cafe
sample_reviews: 店員非常友善～外國旅客可以安心來

The dandanmen noodles and the mango Smoothie we're soo delicious and the sweetbean ice. The owners were so frendly and Patience. One small Highlight is the small handsome Co-Boss (Cat) whos was chilling on the floor.
Unbelievably charming & cool cafe. A sweet staff , some English, English menu. The coffee alone is so good- but also the food / Dan Dan noodles & the Thai rice bowls. Incredible!!!!!
A cafe near the Sunayama beach. We had desserts and it was really good. The food presentation was also quite impressive.
Very tasty food and friendly owners.

name: cafe furari
address: Nishinakasone-3-1 Hirara, Miyakojima, Okinawa 906-0006 日本
sample_reviews: Breakfast was great and healthy, the bread was so good, and the little cheese and pizza bred were awesome very like my hometown Italy. Service was very nice and polite, come here and have lunch it's a nice and quality bakery.
The parfait and the cake qere delicious. The place is very nice and cozy. I will come back again
Really cute bakery with really friendly staff! Tasty pastries! They even gave us some recommendations for other places to visit!
Beautiful hidden place in the island 🤗. The food was delicious and the service very kind, I totally recommend the place!
ランチで利用。

name: coffee shop Majya
address: 日本〒906-0012 Okinawa, Miyakojima, Hirara, Nishizato-448 1F北
sample_reviews: Very kind and friendly barista. If you want to order latte, order cafe au lait 😉
The owner didn't like how we looked and waved us away, 1 star.
席のすぐ横の衝立の向こう側から身内でしょうか、男性と子供が絶えず咳をしていて衛生的にどうかと思います。一口飲んですぐテイクアウトに変更してもらいました。 コーヒーは値段のわりに美味しくはなかった。 二度と行きません。

紹介したくないけど紹介したい店。。。 宮古島で本格的なコーヒーを楽しみたいなら「majya」は外せません。 こんなに美味しいのにスッキリする珈琲飲んだ事ない。。。 店内は落ち着いた雰囲気で、豆の香りに包まれながらゆったりとした時間を過ごせます。 ハンドドリップで丁寧に淹れられたコーヒーは香り高く、酸味やコクのバランスも絶妙。 豆の種類や特徴も分かりやすく説明してくれるので、コーヒー初心者でも楽しめます。 手作りスイーツとの相性も抜群で、特にケーキや焼き菓子はコーヒーとのペアリングにぴったり。 観光の合間に立ち寄って一息つくのに最適なカフェで、地元の方からも愛されている理由がよく分かりました。
드립 커피 전문점 입니다. 선호하는 커피맛을 문의하시면 기호에 맞게 잘 추천해주시고, 로스팅도 직접하시는 곳이며 생 원두를 하나하나 선별하는 모습이 인상적이었습니다. 물론 커피 맛도 좋고, 가게 분위기도 좋았습니다. 주차는 가게 맞은편에 있는 주차장에 하시면 됩니다.

name: ensemble coffee miyakoisland
address: 日本〒906-0015 Okinawa, Miyakojima, Hirara, Kugai-1068-9 中山店舗 1-西
sample_reviews: 點了拿鐵和優格冰沙都十分優秀！

The cafe is clear and modern. It's near the street, although without particular view outside, its mirror deco and plants inside makes it very oceanic and relaxing. It doesn't have a large variety on its menu, but has normal coffee, latte etc.
The coffee shop is comfy and cozy but not much dine in seats.

I was searching for coffee on the island and this place came up. It's got a nice beach vibe even though it's not on the beach, with lots of natural light to add to the ambiance. There are a handful of drink options (but no pour overs) and a few sweets to choose from. I went with the iced americano and it was nice and strong. The terrine looked really good and I'm a bit disappointed I didn't get it. They have various items for sale such as clothing, jewelry, and coffee items. The service was fast and friendly.

Needed an afternoon coffee and sweets break, but wanted something local! Good strong coffee and raw chocolate desserts. Very chic atmosphere! I like my coffee very hot and if you're the same way, be sure to ask when you order!

name: PANIPANI
sample_reviews: The place itself has a nice, natural atmosphere, and the service was friendly. The outdoor seating feels like a European-style patio, and the sandy floor inside gives it a unique, eco-friendly vibe.
You feel as if you've been transported to Bali. And it's the perfect place to rest after some time in the water.
冰拿鐵非常棒，是微甜的鮮奶奶泡在桌邊倒滿！
Beautiful welcoming place. Warm and friendly staff.
Highly recommend the mango smoothie. Tropical vibe. Clean and nice toilet.

name: LB CAFE
sample_reviews: There's nothing particularly special about the scenery or interior, but it's a lovely place to enjoy an ordinary moment.
推薦給想吃甜食的人
服務人員很親切
Cozy place for breakfast. Sandwich and croque madame were good. Pancake was too dried but the peanut sauce was great.訂單類型內用餐點類型早餐平均每人消費金額¥1-1,000餐點：3服務：4氣氛：4建議的餐點Hand Drip Coffee停車位很多停車位附近的停車場免費停車場

Great place for coffee and breakfast. Very friendly staff, excellent range of coffee, many toasted sandwiches looked fantastic and fruits/yoghurts/granola delicious too.訂單類型內用餐點類型早餐平均每人消費金額¥1,000-2,000餐點：5服務：5氣氛：4建議的餐點Hand Drip Coffee停車位很多停車位附近的停車場免費停車場

name: Sima cafe Tounkaraya（島cafeとぅんからや）
sample_reviews: 有小孩玩的 餐點好吃 很適合再來 店員也很客氣！
Our favorite place to chill in the island. Beautiful place and view, nap on the hammock 🌿🦭✨

The food is fantastic and the view is very good, even on a windy day. Tastiest “hamburger” I’ve ever had, really delicious. The mango shaved ice was also excellent but melted very fast in the heat. If you want your drink/dessert and meal served at different times, you have to order them separately. It’s also important to wait to be seated and you cannot be wet (wet hair or swimwear) or sandy. The young man taking the orders spoke some English and was very helpful. I recommend a visit here for lunch during your stay on Miyakojima.
An absolutely gorgeous seaside cafe with a children's playground equipped with a swing, a little slide, and rock climbing (mostly suitable for small children)
One of the best cafe in Miyako island with stunning ocean view. I tried Humburg steak and Sata andagi ice, both of which were amazing. If you are lucky you can choose swing seat.

name: Karakara
sample_reviews: This place is just magical — like something straight out of a dream. It feels like a beautiful granny’s home, filled with warmth and charm. When we arrived, we were greeted by the sweetest old couple who owns the café. They’re so friendly and genuinely kind, even chatting with us for a bit.

Great little mom and pop place with eclectic decor. We stumbled upon it during our time on Miyakojima. The owners were so welcoming and spoke English.  The tomato doria was delicious! They also have late night kareoke until 11pm. We didn't get a chance to check it out but on an island where most things close at 5pm, definitely a bonus!
我地玩ebike路過時發現呢間cafe....座位唔多。但坐得舒服。老闆好好人，見我地咁熱，為我地送上一瓶herb water..即煮咖啡好好飲。
Very friendly old couple cooking nice food. The place itself looks just adorable and it's a little bit hidden from the public.
Just the friendliest place on the island. Pure magic and filled with love. Super beautiful setting - a garden paradise.

name: SR COFFEE MIYAKOJIMA
address: 日本〒906-0013 Okinawa, Miyakojima, Hirara, Shimozato−574-6 ウエスヤビル1F
sample_reviews: 很棒的藝術空間，拿鐵咖啡好喝，冰淇淋香蕉蛋糕好吃，下雨來宮古島不知去哪裡可以來這裡殺時間💖（附：餐點評分 5 分）
A nice coffee. Their matcha was better in my opinion :)
Cool place for coffee, gelato, and art gallery. There was an art exhibition when we went.
Great matcha latte. Perfect atmosphere.

The mango ice cream and milk tea were really good and the owner is really nice and kind, the service was very fast! The place is minimal and stylish, there is a nice garden to eat outside and a terrace too but today it was too hot to stay outside. Either way, absolutely recommend!

name: Coffee Barista
sample_reviews: Coffee was ok - a little burnt taste but I give them a pass. Mini sweet croissants reminded me of Argentine medialunas and were awesome. Service is great.
After shaking in the rain the place was like heaven. Decent food choices. Tiramisu was horrible.
Plenty of seating. Good selection of coffee and sweets.
Coffee is tasty. No big choice for food.
它面向一條主幹道。

name: Doug's Coffee
sample_reviews: 一份漢堡+套餐，一份大沙拉，隔壁再買杯咖啡，足夠2個大人吃，8-9分飽剛剛好
Touch down to here finally. Very crispy toast and deep roasted (Brazil and Guatemala??) no sour taste. Bad things is big nose typing boy was sitting for a long time since opening lol

Not great! Got the over priced breakfast set with toast, a boiled egg and a cup of coffee and my wife order tea with a muffin. There were only 2 tables including us in the restaurant but we waited a very long time. After over 10 mins my wife's order came but not mine, then after another 5 mins the toast and egg came but they said the coffee would be a bit longer, I decided to start eating and finished my food while still waiting for coffee. Finally coffee comes, no milk or sugar so I went up to the counter to ask for milk, but they gave me nothing to mix it with.
good quality and atmosphere! Recommended for coffee lovers❤️

Very tasty tamago sando, one of the best I've ever had. Came on a weekday morning, not too busy. Managed to park in front of the shop in a stop labelled as Doug's burger. There should be a second, larger, parking a little bit further.
